# Soul Blades — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Soul Blades is an original Hebrew fantasy/action series created by the user, following 9-year-old Mondiev who discovers his late father was a legendary warrior and inherits the mythical Soul Blade — a sword that absorbs power from enemies but risks cracking under overuse. The series features dark, dramatic storytelling with anime-style themes including mysterious enemies with a red-eye symbol, a mentor named Rain, epic battles, and an evolving power system. The tone is intense and emotional, blending coming-of-age grief with supernatural action.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://example.com
הצטרפו למסע האפל של מונדיב בן ה-9, יורש להב הנשמה המיתולוגי. סדרת פנטזיה עברית מקורית עם קרבות אפיים, אויבים מסתוריים וכוח שעלול להתנפץ. היכנסו עכשיו לעולם שבו כל ניצחון גובה מחיר.

### תודה על פנייתך | Soul Blades
https://example.com/thank-you
Soul Blades - תודה על פנייתך | Soul Blades

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text)
  - `email` (email)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Soul Blades
Soul Blades is an original Hebrew fantasy/action series created by the user, following 9-year-old Mondiev who discovers his late father was a legendary warrior and inherits the mythical Soul Blade — a sword that absorbs power from enemies but risks cracking under overuse. The series features dark, dramatic storytelling with anime-style themes including mysterious enemies with a red-eye symbol, a mentor named Rain, epic battles, and an evolving power system. The tone is intense and emotional, blending coming-of-age grief with supernatural action.

## Services/Products
- פרק 1 – מונדייב והחרב האגדית
- פרק 2 – ההבטחה
- פרק 3 – האימון מתחיל
- פרק 4 – הגנרל הראשון

## Target Audience
- אוהדי אנימה, פנטזיה ואקשן
- אוהדי אנימה ופנטזיה
- חובבי סדרות אקשן

## Industry
Entertainment / Original Fiction Series
